title: Sleep Everywhere
description: Lets you sleep in The Nether and The End without your bed exploding.
body:
# 🛏 Sleep Everywhere !!

**Makes bed-exploding dimensions not explode beds.**

![Minecraft Bed in "The Nether" from Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2bc6b5a96b2472ae56f8d23140557d945eae973_0.webp)
## Features
- You can sleep in the nether
- You can even sleep in The End
## Disclaimer
- This mod is not revolutionary; it took like 10 minutes to make
- Disables the use of bed PvP
- Disables the use of the explosion to find ancient debris

## Why should you download?
Honestly, it's your choice. I just wanted to post my first working mod online
